module.name: polarplot
module.description: A polar plot r = f(t) (SVG): one expression in t (the angle) per section, e.g. "1 + cos(t)" for a cardioid. Auto-scaled, with polar grid.
module.aiSpec:
A POLAR PLOT — curves r = f(t) where t is the angle in radians. Use this for polar curves (cardioids, roses, spirals); for a normal y = f(x) graph use @plot and for a 1-D axis use @numberline. Block module: split the body with <!-- @ -->, one curve per section written "expression | label" (label optional). Expressions use t and standard math (sin cos tan exp log sqrt abs PI E, ^ for power): cardioid "1 + cos(t)", rose "cos(3*t)", spiral "t/6". Negative r is drawn through the origin (standard convention). Parameters: • tmin / tmax — angle range in radians (default 0 to 6.283185 ≈ 2π). • grid — draw the polar grid of rings and spokes (true/false, default true). • samples — number of points sampled per curve, higher = smoother (30-2000, default 360). • thickness — curve stroke width in SVG units (0.5-5, default 1.2). • legend — show the label legend under the plot (true/false, default true). • fill — fill the area enclosed by each curve with a translucent tint (true/false, default false).
<!-- @polarplot tmax: 6.283185, fill: true --> 1 + cos(t) | cardioid <!-- @ --> cos(3*t) | rose <!-- @end -->

param.name: tmin
param.label: t min (rad)
param.desc: Start angle in radians (any real; blank/invalid = 0).

param.name: tmax
param.label: t max (rad)
param.desc: End angle in radians (any real; default ≈ 2π for a full turn).

param.name: grid
param.label: Show polar grid
param.desc: Draw the background rings and angular spokes.

param.name: samples
param.label: Samples per curve
param.desc: Points sampled along each curve; higher is smoother but heavier.

param.name: thickness
param.label: Curve thickness
param.desc: Stroke width of the curves in SVG units.

param.name: legend
param.label: Show legend
param.desc: Show the color/label legend under the plot.

param.name: fill
param.label: Fill curves
param.desc: Fill the area enclosed by each curve with a translucent tint.

snippet.label: Polar plot r = f(t)
snippet.description: Polar curves from expressions in t; cardioids, roses, spirals.
